title: New Linux RDP expert skill is live
summary: Update your linux-admin plugin to get the new /linux-admin:rdp-expert skill for XRDP and Linux remote desktop troubleshooting across GNOME, KDE, XFCE, MATE, Cinnamon, LXQt, Xorg, and Wayland environments.
highlights: Covers GNOME, KDE Plasma, XFCE, MATE, Cinnamon, LXQt, Xorg/Wayland, PAM, Polkit, clipboard, audio, firewall, and black-screen issues.
Plugin package metadata is aligned to 1.17.21 with 107 expert skills.
